title: Amethyst Launcher Modpack
description: This is an optimisation modpack made especially for AngelAuraMC's (AAMC) launcher, Amethyst.
body:
# Amethyst Modpack
This is the official modpack for [AngelAuraMC](https://github.com/AngelAuraMC)'s Amethyst Launcher for Mobile Devices. It aims to improve performance while you game on the go. It can also be run on regular computers, but we suggest you use [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) instead. You can join the AngelAuraMC Discord Server by [**clicking here**](https://discord.gg/5ptqkyZxEy). You can ask for help if you run into any issues, or simply chat with the community! ## What is Amethyst? Amethyst is a Minecraft: Java Edition launcher for mobile devices running Android and iOS. Amethyst is developed by AngelAuraMC, and you can check out their wiki by [*clicking here!*](https://wiki.angelauramc.dev/) Amethyst is available for [**Android**](https://github.com/AngelAuraMC/Amethyst-Android) and [**iOS**](https://github.com/AngelAuraMC/Amethyst-iOS), and you can get them by clicking on the bold blue text with the name of your device's OS. ## FAQ 1. ***Where can I download Amethyst?*** - You can download Amethyst’s [iOS]() & [Android]() versions via our [GitHub Repository]() 2. ***Why is Sodium not supported?*** - This decision comes after the previous PojavLauncher staff refused to work with CaffeineMC on several issues between the two organizations, and our decision comes out of respect for CaffeineMC. [Full message](https://discord.com/channels/1359064958872195143/1359066400676647014/1376636275141906574).
